name: clinical-research-assistant
description: Clinical research tools for general surgery residents — literature review, statistical analysis, visualization, and manuscript writing

plugins.name: clinical-research-assistant
plugins.description: Interactive clinical research assistant with 4 commands: /literature-review (deep PubMed/bioRxiv search + gap analysis), /analyze (statistics + Excel tables), /visualize (publication-quality figures), /write-methods-results (manuscript sections)
